vocab.example: My luxury timepiece cost a pretty penny, but its durability and precision make it worth every cent.

vocab.meaning: ăn mặc chỉnh tề, lộng lẫy
vocab.example: I usually reserve my gold watch for special occasions when I need to be dressed to the nines.

vocab.meaning: có một khoảng thời gian cực kỳ vui vẻ
vocab.example: I don't wear a watch when I'm on vacation because I just want to have a whale of a time without worrying about the schedule.
Having a watch on my wrist helps me arrive at my lectures in the nick of time, avoiding any late entries.

vocab.meaning: đầy đủ các tính năng hiện đại (đôi khi không cần thiết)
vocab.example: I'm not a fan of smartwatches with all the bells and whistles; I prefer the simplicity of a standard clock face.
